message:
test: adapt golden_outputs and multi_protocol_e2e to child-region API

Following the region admission tightening (Finalizing rejects child
creation), tests that previously created multiple independent root
regions now properly create a single root and derive child regions
from it via create_child_region(). This matches the intended hierarchy
where protocol-specific regions are children of a base root, not
independent roots.

Affected tests:
- golden_runtime_state_region_lifecycle: r2, r3 now children of r1
- run_deterministic_workload: same hierarchy restructure
- e2e_multi_timer_driven_timeouts: http/grpc/ws regions under base_root
- e2e_multi_graceful_shutdown: protocol regions under base_root

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
